executives.name: Richard Homsany
executives.background: Mr Homsany is an experienced corporate lawyer and has over 30 years’ experience in the resources sector. He is the Executive Chairman of Toro Energy Limited and also serves as the Chairman of Healthia Limited and Galan Lithium Limited. He has extensive experience in corporate law, finance, and management within the mining industry.
